title: Shooter
body:
![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/229772f021236d85affb25abc986f3af21acc465.png)

A perfectly tuned shooter modpack that allows you to experience lots of FPS games like Valorant, Counter Strike and Rainbow Six Siege in Minecraft with your friends!

# Mods:
- All Optimizations & Essentials!
  - Online Play, Shaders etc.
- Timeless and Classics Zero
  - Timeless and Classics Guns: LesRaisins Append Pack
- Shoulder Surfing Reloaded
  - Third Person Shooting: Zero

# Maps (will be more):
## Valorant:
- Split
- Haven
## Rainbow Six: Siege:
- Chalet
